summary: New pathway created for unscheduled bleeding on HRT.
Built primarily from BMS Nov 2024 guidance with NICE context.
editor_checklist: Confirm local D&G service endpoint names for urgent TVUS and USOC referral.
Confirm whether to include explicit ccHRT/sHRT endometrial thickness cut-offs in public-facing page copy or keep in clinician notes.
Confirm local follow-up interval wording after HRT adjustment and post-imaging reassurance.
